mapper.select: SELECT FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.status = NVL(#{status}, 'ACTIVE') AND u.created_at >= SYSDATE - 30

SELECT id, name, status FROM users
AND status = 'ACTIVE'
AND status = 'INACTIVE'
AND status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PENDING')
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, status, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, NVL(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT u.name, d.dept_name FROM users u, departments d WHERE u.dept_id = d.id(+) AND u.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT id, name, DECODE(status, 'A', 'Active', 'I', 'Inactive', 'P', 'Pending', 'Unknown') AS status_label FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
